response.step_by_step_log:
1. Analyzed video and identified performer as Mori Calliope and the song being performed as 'LET'S JUST CRASH' based on lyrics and audio. The stage backdrop 'DISASTER SHOW' appeared to be the name of the performance, not the song.
2. Searched for 'Mori Calliope "Let's just crash" lyrics' and found the official lyrics (romaji and English).
3. The video is a single continuous performance from 00:00 to 05:00.
4. Compiled full lyrics and prepared JSON object.
response.global_summary: A performance video of Mori Calliope singing her original song 'LET'S JUST CRASH' on a stage with a 'DISASTER SHOW' backdrop.

scenes.description: Mori Calliope performing her song 'LET'S JUST CRASH' on stage with a 'DISASTER SHOW' backdrop. The song features a mix of English and Japanese lyrics.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
[Intro]
Hey!
You got eyes and ears, but you don't look or listen!
In other words, you're useless.
Every last one of ya!
And that's why I'm gonna send you all to hell.
All of humanity.

[Verse 1]
Seien seoi sassou to toujou
Sou iun janee
I'm just the type you'd forget so
Don't waste your time!
Chigire kusari kake no chain
Going insane
Somebody's gotta pay
While I live with the pain
Laugh at me now
I'm the one you can't tame, hah!

[Pre-Chorus]
Teizoku de saitei no tensai
Sou iun de ii
Omoi ga tsumoru basho ni hana wa saku kara
[Let's riot]
[Get back, you're trash]
Hakidame de kibou wo
[Let's just crash]
Tsumiagete ikunda
Itadaki kara takaraka ni warae
[Lose control]
Utsukushiki risou wo
[Heads will roll]
Kegashite kuru yarou wa
Dare da ittai? Dare da ittai?
Dare datta to shite mo
Kono risou wa muri daro tte
Dare ga itta to shite mo kanaete kou ze

[Chorus]
Seikai fuseikai no kaitou
Dou datte ii
Sonna tokku no tou ni koeta basho ni ore wa tatteiru
Meaningless problems, everybody's got 'em
And they can't be satisfied until somebody's at the bottom.
So what?
You think you're special 'cause you got some grit and hunger?
We ain't getting any younger,
Thinking, 'let's just crash'.

[Verse 2]
Kokoro ga kayou toki ni tamashii ga sakebu
[Hoo-hoo]
[Get back, you're trash]
Dobunezumi no you ni
[Let's just crash]
Kedakaku ikirunda
Ore ga tooru ima sugu ni doke

[Chorus]
[Let's riot]
[Get back, you're trash]
Hakidame de kibou wo
[Let's just crash]
Tsumiagete ikunda
Itadaki kara takaraka ni warae
[Lose control]
Utsukushiki risou wo
[Heads will roll]
Kegashite kuru yarou wa
Dare da ittai? Dare da ittai?
Dare datta to shite mo
Kono risou wa muri daro tte
Dare ga itta to shite mo kanaete kou ze

[Outro]
Oh-oh, woah-oh!
Kanaete kou ze!
[Ha-ha-ha-ha-ha-ha-ha]
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
[Intro]
Hey!
You got eyes and ears, but you don't look or listen!
In other words, you're useless.
Every last one of ya!
And that's why I'm gonna send you all to hell.
All of humanity.

[Verse 1]
[Japanese: Riding on cheers, making a dashing entrance]
That's not what I mean.
I'm just the type you'd forget, so
Don't waste your time!
[Japanese: Breaking, corroding chains]
Going insane.
Somebody's gotta pay
While I live with the pain.
Laugh at me now,
I'm the one you can't tame, hah!

[Pre-Chorus]
[Japanese: Vulgar and low-life genius]
Just let it be like that.
[Japanese: Where longings pile up, flowers will bloom]
[Let's riot]
[Get back, you're trash]
[Japanese: Finding hope in a dump]
[Let's just crash]
[Japanese: I'll pile them up]
[Japanese: Laugh loudly from the top]
[Lose control]
[Japanese: That beautiful ideal]
[Heads will roll]
[Japanese: The bastards who dirty it]
[Japanese: Who is it, who is it?]
[Japanese: No matter who it is]
[Japanese: Even if someone says this ideal is impossible]
[Japanese: No matter who says it, let's achieve it]

[Chorus]
[Japanese: Correct or incorrect answer]
Doesn't matter.
[Japanese: I am already standing at a place far beyond that]
Meaningless problems, everybody's got 'em
And they can't be satisfied until somebody's at the bottom.
So what?
You think you're special 'cause you got some grit and hunger?
We ain't getting any younger,
Thinking, 'let's just crash'.

[Verse 2]
[Japanese: When hearts connect, the soul screams]
[Hoo-hoo]
[Get back, you're trash]
[Japanese: Like a sewer rat]
[Let's just crash]
[Japanese: Living nobly]
[Japanese: I'm passing through, get out of my way now]

[Chorus]
[Let's riot]
[Get back, you're trash]
[Japanese: Finding hope in a dump]
[Let's just crash]
[Japanese: I'll pile them up]
[Japanese: Laugh loudly from the top]
[Lose control]
[Japanese: That beautiful ideal]
[Heads will roll]
[Japanese: The bastards who dirty it]
[Japanese: Who is it, who is it?]
[Japanese: No matter who it is]
[Japanese: Even if someone says this ideal is impossible]
[Japanese: No matter who says it, let's achieve it]

[Outro]
Oh-oh, woah-oh!
[Japanese: Let's achieve it]
[Ha-ha-ha-ha-ha-ha-ha]
